schema.title: EmployeeOnboarding
schema.description: Unified employee onboarding schema combining identity, lifecycle status, task checklist, and role-based access control. Derived from Employee, Data Schema, Choice, and Onboarding Role sheets.

employee_id.description: Unique employee identifier assigned by the HR system.

employee_name.description: Full legal name of the employee.

employee_email.description: Work email address. Must be unique across all employee records.

department.description: Business unit or department the employee is assigned to.

position.description: Job title or role of the employee.

start_date.description: Official employment start date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

manager.description: Reference to the reporting manager's user ID in sys_user. Null if not yet assigned.

pending.label: Pending
pending.description: Employee record created but no onboarding steps have started yet.

in_progress.label: In Progress
in_progress.description: At least one checklist item is true; onboarding is actively underway.

completed.label: Completed
completed.description: All checklist items are true and onboarding is fully done.

on_hold.label: On Hold
on_hold.description: Onboarding is paused; can be set from any state and resumed later.

equipment_requested.description: Hardware or equipment request has been submitted.

it_account_created.description: IT accounts including email, SSO, and tools have been provisioned.

workspace_assigned.description: Physical or virtual workspace has been assigned to the employee.

orientation_completed.description: Employee has attended the company orientation session.

documents_completed.description: All general onboarding paperwork beyond HR contracts has been submitted (e.g. tax forms, direct deposit setup).

hr_documents_completed.description: HR-specific documents — employment contract, NDA, and policy acknowledgements — have been signed. Corresponds to 'HR Documents Completed' in the source table.

employee_training.description: Mandatory onboarding training modules have been finished.

notes.description: Free-text remarks about the employee or their onboarding context.

x_roles.description: Role definitions governing who can read or write each part of this schema.

hr_onboarding_admin.description: HR administrators who manage all aspects of onboarding records.

onboarding_manager.description: Managers who can view and update onboarding records for their direct reports.

it_onboarding.description: IT personnel who manage IT-related onboarding tasks.

relationships.description: manager field references the sys_user table in ServiceNow. Null if no manager is assigned yet.

businessRules.description: onboarding_status cannot be set to 'completed' unless all checklist fields are true.
businessRules.expression: status == 'completed' REQUIRES ALL(equipment_requested, it_account_created, workspace_assigned, orientation_completed, documents_completed, hr_documents_completed, employee_training) == true

businessRules.description: Status follows sequence pending(0) → in_progress(1) → completed(2). on_hold(3) can be set from any state. Status cannot go backwards.
businessRules.expression: onboarding_status.sequence is monotonically increasing except when transitioning to or from on_hold

businessRules.description: manager may be null at record creation but must be populated before onboarding_status transitions to 'in_progress'.
When all checklist items become true, onboarding_status should automatically advance to 'completed' unless it is currently 'on_hold'.
